⚠️ Geopolitical Oil Impact

🔴 ACTIVE CONFLICT ALERT
Iran Conflict Disrupting Strait of Hormuz — Oil Markets Volatile
Approximately 20% of global oil passes through the Strait of Hormuz. Current tensions are creating upward pressure on crude prices, which directly affects diesel costs for U.S. operators within 2–6 weeks.
↑ Crude +$4.20/bbl Watch: CA & West Coast Gulf Coast = Lowest Risk
⚡ TRUCKER ADVISORY
Lock In Fuel-Adjusted Rates Now Before Prices Spike
Historical data shows diesel prices can jump $0.30–0.60/gal within weeks of Middle East supply disruptions. Lock in rates with fuel surcharges now. Avoid long-term fixed-rate contracts without fuel escalation clauses.
Add Fuel Surcharge Short-Term Contracts Hedge With Gulf Loads

🚛 Trucker Weather & Road Intel

Tap refresh to load latest conditions
🚨I-70 Eastbound CLOSED — Vail Pass, COCLOSED
Interstate 70 · MM 190-195 · Vail Pass, Colorado
Commercial vehicle restriction in effect due to severe winter conditions. Ice and blowing snow reducing visibility to near zero. All trucks prohibited from continuing eastbound.
🔀 TRUCK DETOUR: Take US-40 via Steamboat Springs to I-25 South. Add approx 2.5 hrs. Check COTRIP.org for real-time updates.
⛓️Chain Law in Effect — I-80 Sierra NevadaCHAINS REQ.
Interstate 80 · Donner Pass, CA · MM 148-174
R2 chain controls active. All commercial vehicles must have chains installed. Expect significant delays of 45–90 minutes at chain inspection stations.
🔀 ALT ROUTE: I-5 via Stockton adds 110 miles but avoids pass entirely. Recommended for doubles/triples.
🌬️High Wind Advisory — I-10 Desert CorridorWIND ADVISORY
Interstate 10 · Palm Springs to Indio, CA · MM 100-135
Sustained winds 45–55 mph with gusts to 70 mph. High-profile vehicles and empty trailers at extreme rollover risk. Variable message signs active.
⚠️ NO SAFE DETOUR: Pull into a truck stop and wait for advisory to expire. Expected to lift by 6PM local time.
🌊Flooding — I-40 Near Memphis, TNFLOOD WARNING
Interstate 40 · West Memphis, AR to Memphis, TN · MM 275-285
Standing water reported on roadway following heavy overnight rainfall. Right lane restricted. Reduce speed to 45 mph. Flash flood watch continues until 8PM.
🔀 TRUCK DETOUR: I-55 South to US-61 North bypasses the worst section. Adds 25 minutes.
🔧Construction — I-95 Corridor NJ/PACONSTRUCTION
Interstate 95 · Trenton, NJ to Philadelphia, PA · MM 1-15
Lane restrictions 7AM–6PM weekdays. Trucks over 40 tons require permit. Overnight haulers should plan for full closure Fri–Sun nights through April 2026.
🔀 USE: New Jersey Turnpike (I-95 toll) southern section or US-1 as daytime alternate.
⚖️Weight Station Alert — I-81 VirginiaWEIGH STATION
Interstate 81 Northbound · Raphine, VA · MM 205
Enhanced enforcement week in effect. All commercial vehicles must exit. Pre-pass and DriveWyze users — overrides suspended this week. Allow extra time.
📋 ENSURE: Axle weights legal, paperwork current, lights operational before approaching.
Major trucking corridors — updated hourly
I-10
INTERSTATE
Jacksonville, FL → Los Angeles, CA
⚠️ Partial Restriction Active
Wind advisory Palm Springs CA. All other sections clear. Heavy freight volumes through TX corridor.

INTERSTATE

🚨 Closed — Vail Pass, CO

INTERSTATE

R2 chain law active Donner Pass. Rest of corridor clear. Good conditions through Wyoming.

INTERSTATE
Syracuse, NY → Knoxville, TN
✅ Clear — Enhanced Enforcement
Weigh station enforcement week in VA. Roads clear. Watch for fog in TN mountain sections at night.

INTERSTATE
Wilmington, NC → Barstow, CA
⚠️ Flooding Near Memphis, TN
Right lane restricted W. Memphis area. Remainder of corridor clear. Good rates TX/OK sections.
I-35
INTERSTATE
Laredo, TX → Duluth, MN
✅ Clear — High Volume
All clear. Heavy northbound freight from Laredo. Watch for icy patches MN/IA sections overnight.
I-95
INTERSTATE
Miami, FL → Houlton, ME
⚠️ Construction NJ/PA Section
Lane reductions Trenton-Philadelphia. Overnight full closures Fri-Sun. All other sections clear.
I-20
INTERSTATE
Florence, SC → Kent, TX
✅ Clear — Favorable Conditions
All clear across full corridor. Good reefer rates Atlanta to Dallas. Fuel cheapest in AL and MS.
Critical mountain passes for commercial vehicles
🏔️ Vail Pass
I-70 · Colorado · Elev. 10,662 ft
🚨 CLOSED
Temp: 14°F
Snow: 8" new
Vis: Near Zero
Wind: 62 mph
🚫 Commercial vehicle prohibition in effect. No trucks, RVs, or high-profile vehicles. Use US-40 via Steamboat Springs as detour. CDOT estimates reopening after 6PM pending plowing operations.
🏔️ Donner Pass
I-80 · California · Elev. 7,227 ft
⛓️ CHAINS REQ.
Temp: 28°F
Snow: 3" new
Vis: 1/4 mile
Wind: 28 mph
⛓️ R2 chain controls — all commercial vehicles must have chains on drive axles. Inspection stations active at Truckee. Allow 60–90 min delay. Alt: I-5 via Stockton (adds 110 mi).
🏔️ Eisenhower Tunnel
I-70 · Colorado · Elev. 11,013 ft
🚨 CLOSED
Temp: 9°F
Snow: 11" new
Vis: Zero
Wind: 75 mph
🚫 Closed to all traffic. Blizzard conditions. No reopening ETA. All eastbound I-70 traffic stopped at Silverthorne. Check COTRIP.org every 30 minutes for status update.
🏔️ Tehachapi Pass
CA-58 · California · Elev. 3,967 ft
✅ OPEN
Temp: 44°F
Snow: None
Vis: 10 mi
Wind: 18 mph
✅ Clear and open. Good alternate between I-5 and I-40 for CA-bound loads. Watch for crosswinds near wind farm sections — empty trailers exercise caution.
🏔️ Snoqualmie Pass
I-90 · Washington · Elev. 3,022 ft
⛓️ CHAINS ADV.
Temp: 31°F
Snow: 1" new
Vis: 2 miles
Wind: 22 mph
⚠️ Chain advisory for commercial vehicles. Roads passable with caution. WSDOT plows active. Traction tires acceptable for now — monitor for upgrade to requirement.
🏔️ Raton Pass
I-25 · CO/NM Border · Elev. 7,834 ft
✅ OPEN
Temp: 36°F
Snow: None
Vis: 10 mi
Wind: 15 mph
✅ Open and clear. Good conditions for I-25 north/south corridor between NM and CO. No restrictions. Fuel up in Raton NM — cheapest within 80 miles.

🛡️ DOT Inspection Readiness

0%
Pre-Trip Inspection Score
Check items below to track your readiness
🔴 Brakes & Wheels
Brake Adjustment — All Axles
Check stroke on all brakes. Out-of-adjustment brakes = immediate OOS violation.
CRITICAL
Brake Lines & Hoses
No cracked, chafed, or leaking air lines. Check glad hands and couplings.
CRITICAL
Tire Condition & Tread Depth
Steer tires min 4/32", drive/trailer min 2/32". Check for bulges, cuts, improper inflation.
CRITICAL
Wheel Fasteners & Lug Nuts
All lugs present, no missing or loose fasteners. Check for rust streaks.
CRITICAL
💡 Lights & Electrical
Headlights — High & Low Beam
Both working, properly aimed. No cracked or yellowed lenses.
CRITICAL
Brake Lights & Turn Signals
Test all four corners. Trailer brake lights are a top violation category.
CRITICAL
Marker & Clearance Lights
All amber & red marker lights working. #1 most cited violation in CVSA inspections.
HIGH
Reflectors & Reflective Tape
All required reflectors present and clean. Trailer side tape unbroken.
HIGH
🔗 Coupling & Cargo
Fifth Wheel — Locked & Secured
Jaws fully closed around kingpin. Safety catch engaged. No visible gap. Tug test.
CRITICAL
Landing Gear — Fully Raised
Both legs up, crank handle secured. Check for bends or damage.
HIGH
Cargo Securement
Correct number of tie-downs for cargo weight. No overloaded axles. Tarps secured.
CRITICAL
📋 Documents & Compliance
Valid CDL — Correct Class & Endorsements
Not expired. Correct endorsements (HazMat, Tanker, etc.) for your load.
CRITICAL
ELD / HOS Compliance
Hours of service current. ELD functioning. No falsified logs. 8-day recap correct.
CRITICAL
Medical Certificate (DOT Physical)
Current and not expired. Must be on person. Check renewal date.
CRITICAL
Registration & Operating Authority
Cab card in truck. MC/DOT numbers displayed on door. IFTA & IRP current.
HIGH
Insurance & Liability Docs
Current insurance card. Minimum $750K liability. Cargo coverage docs available.
HIGH
Bill of Lading / Load Documents
BOL signed, weight correct, commodity described accurately. HazMat placards if needed.
HIGH
🔧 Engine & Fluids
Engine Oil Level
Between min and max on dipstick. Check for leaks under truck.
HIGH
Coolant Level & DEF Fluid
Coolant at proper level. DEF (Diesel Exhaust Fluid) sufficient for trip. Low DEF = derate.
HIGH
No Active Dashboard Warning Lights
Check engine, ABS, SRS, DPF — document and address any active alerts before rolling.
HIGH
🦺 Safety Equipment
Emergency Triangles (3) or Flares
3 bi-directional reflective triangles required. Must be in cab, accessible.
CRITICAL
Fire Extinguisher — Charged & Mounted
Minimum 5 B:C rating. Gauge in green. Securely mounted within reach of driver.
CRITICAL
Spare Fuses
Assorted spare fuses for cab electrical. Required by FMCSA 393.95.
MEDIUM
🛡️ Based on FMCSA Part 392 & CVSA North American Standard Inspection Criteria · Not a substitute for official training

⏱️ Hours of Service Calculator

Property Carrying Rule (49 CFR 395.3): 11 hours driving after 10 consecutive hours off duty. 14-hour on-duty window. 60/70-hour limit in 7/8 days. 30-minute break required after 8 hours driving.
